description: Crafted for the woman who never compromises on style and comfort, this trendy sandal from catwalk makes for a great addition to your wardrobe. With a sleek design and simple silhouette it will look great with all kinds of clothing.UpperSuede leather thong style straps with nubuck lining and silver stud decorationLeather toe separatorElasticated striped strap over midfootNubuck and patent leather footbed for comfort and durabilityOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with wave shaped lugs for absolute grip and tractionStitch detail along side of outsoleSandal careWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
